allow: Bash(curl -s --get https://eutils.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/entrez/eutils/esearch.fcgi --data-urlencode db=pubmed --data-urlencode retmode=json --data-urlencode retmax=0 --data-urlencode 'term=\("diabetes mellitus, type 2"[MeSH]\) AND \("New England Journal of Medicine"[Journal] OR "Lancet"[Journal] OR "JAMA"[Journal] OR "Nature Medicine"[Journal]\)')
